patterns.comment: Maps functions to a tag scope (Often renders as bright red/pink on GitHub web)
patterns.name: entity.name.tag.speckle

patterns.comment: Maps variables to an markup/bold scope (Often renders as distinct deep orange)
patterns.name: markup.bold.speckle

patterns.comment: Maps strings to regex strings (Forces a separate purple/teal color line)
patterns.name: string.regexp.speckle
